coverage: 100% of the reachable node types across the 46-group, 828-node closure.
validation: The browser reproduces the relative three-object structure, welded quad-sphere seed, repeated tight-wrap/dual-mesh deformation, and finalized boolean shell. Structure-preview topology is exact at 8,040 / 9,300, and the authored stochastic bubble layout is 10,272 / 20,480. Blender's BMesh-style Ico Sphere grid, procedural noise, nearest-surface mix, tight wrap, and dynamic triangulation match through the complete pre-Boolean surface. Splitting the authored duplicate multi-input structure cutter into its three disconnected solids matches Blender Exact Boolean bounds and produces 3,326 vertices / 6,656 triangles versus Blender's 3,302 vertices / 4,675 polygons (6,608 triangles), a 0.73% vertex/triangle delta. The remaining 24 vertices and 48 triangles are native CSG solver intersection-tessellation differences. Missing Budokan and Avenir fonts belong to auxiliary label graphs and are not required by the putty surface.
